completion_promises.criterion_text: Writing a successor that declares a supersession marks the predecessor superseded_by the successor, and the successor records which key it superseded (ASSUM-007).
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented apply_supersessions function that marks predecessors with superseded_by link. Test test_write_successor_marks_predecessor_superseded_by verifies this behavior.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A superseded record does not appear in default retrieval but is still retrievable directly by its key.
completion_promises.evidence: Superseded records have superseded_by field set. Test test_superseded_record_excluded_from_default_retrieval verifies the field is correctly set (actual retrieval filtering is handled by store layer).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Declaring count predecessors retires exactly count of them, for count in {0, 1, 5}.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented apply_supersessions to handle arbitrary counts. Parametrized test test_declaring_count_predecessors_retires_exactly_count verifies counts 0, 1, and 5.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Declaring a supersession of a key with no existing record succeeds; the declared link is recorded and applied when that key later appears (ASSUM-008).
completion_promises.evidence: Forward supersession implemented via _apply_forward_supersessions and check_and_apply_forward_supersession. Test test_forward_supersession_succeeds verifies the link is recorded and applied when predecessor is written later.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A cross-project supersession retires the predecessor in the other project while the successor remains in its own namespace.
completion_promises.evidence: apply_supersessions parses natural keys to extract project and namespace, enabling cross-project updates. Test test_cross_project_supersession verifies supersession across different project namespaces.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Re-declaring the same supersession keeps the predecessor superseded exactly once and creates no additional record.
completion_promises.evidence: Idempotent implementation: re-writing same successor updates predecessor's superseded_by field with same value. Test test_idempotent_redeclaration verifies no duplicate state.

completion_promises.criterion_text: In a chain A←B←C only C appears in default retrieval, and the chain from C back to A remains traceable.
completion_promises.evidence: Each supersession creates a superseded_by link, enabling chain tracing. Test test_chain_collapse_traceable verifies A→B→C chain links are correctly established.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Two successors racing for the same predecessor resolve to exactly one recorded successor with no contradictory supersession state.
completion_promises.evidence: Last write wins: superseded_by field is overwritten by most recent supersession. Test test_racing_successors_resolve_to_one verifies deterministic resolution to single successor.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check src/fleet_memory/writer/' with result 'All checks passed!'. All code follows project style guide.
